title: Chirality with protected zeros
statement: The $\gamma^5$ chirality structure with protected zeros emerges in the TECT background (legacy Pillar-5 closure).
scope: Within the legacy theorem's stated class. TSv2 entry capped at T6 pending package reconstruction.
falsifier: A protected-zero violation within the theorem's stated class on re-validation.

next_action: M1-migrate the Pillar-5 chain and enumerate its inherited assumptions explicitly.
